hero.tagline: Software developer, math enthusiast and hobby astronomer
hero.intro: Hi, I'm Jonas, a passionate science and technology geek. I love learning new things about the world around us and applying what I learn to efficiently solve problems.
hero.communication: I love sharing my knowledge and prioritize clear communication, ensuring that ideas and requirements are understood by everyone involved.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Software Developer & Applied Mathematician
about.bio1: I currently work as a web developer at Databay AG, where I completed my apprenticeship as a "Mathematical-Technical Software Developer" in 2023. Simultaneously, I successfully completed my Bachelor of Science in "Applied Mathematics and Computer Science" at FH Aachen University of Applied Sciences in 2024 as part of a dual study program.
about.bio2: During these years, I gained extensive experience in PHP development. Initially, I worked with React and Symfony, but relatively quickly switched to the seminar management team and contributed to the company's in-house software.
about.bio3: In my free time, I further developed my dev skills by working on various hobby projects. Like any developer, I have dozens of unfinished prototypes (various to-do lists, blogs and folders named 'project_v2_FINAL'). However, out of all my hobby projects, four stand out that I consider worth presenting.
about.workSHK: Student assistant in a pilot project for E-Learning

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of my personal projects and what I'm working on.
projects.homepage: The site you are currently on. Information about me and my projects.
projects.polepick: Predict the next Formula 1 race outcome and compete with others.
projects.woodcutters: A simulation game about deforestation for the political education of young people.
projects.tournament: Summarize and present upcoming esports tournaments.
projects.amronas: Manage and share movie lists, play Wordle against each other, a "Deutsche Bahn" travel bingo, etc.
